name: CT Dose Calculator
description: Clinical calculator template for CT dose estimation and optimization

findings.technique: CT dose calculation and analysis based on protocol parameters.

sections.name: Protocol Parameters
sections.content: Scan length: [X] cm | Number of slices: [X] | Collimation: [X] mm | Rotation time: [X] s | Pitch: [X]

sections.name: Dose Metrics
sections.content: CTDIvol: [X] mGy | DLP: [X] mGy-cm | Effective dose: [X] mSv

sections.name: Dose Comparison
sections.content: This scan is [above/below/below] the ACR dose reference levels for [examination type].

sections.name: Optimization Opportunities
sections.content: Potential dose reduction strategies: [iterative reconstruction / dose modulation / reduced kVp / decreased scan length].

impression:
CT Dose Assessment:
1. CTDIvol: [X] mGy
2. Effective dose estimate: [X] mSv
3. [Dose is within/above] ACR reference levels.
author: RadReport Templates
